title: colymbada scabiosa var. praealpina
intro: Colymbada scabiosa var. praealpina, also known as a mountain scabious, is a perennial plant species belonging to the genus Colymbada and the family Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Colymbada scabiosa var. praealpina include its ability to soothe digestive issues and relieve symptoms of respiratory problems, such as bronchitis. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's roots to create a tincture, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions.
